nasb.text: Wail, O cypress, for the cedar has fallen, Because the glorious trees have been destroyed; Wail, O oaks of Bashan, For the impenetrable forest has come down.

esv.text: Wail, O cypress, for the cedar has fallen, for the glorious trees are ruined! Wail, oaks of Bashan, for the thick forest has been felled!

cnv.text: 松樹啊！哀號吧，因為香柏樹已經倒下， 雄壯的樹木都毀壞了； 巴珊的橡樹啊！哀號吧， 因為茂密的樹林被砍下來了。

ccb.text: 松树啊，哀号吧， 因为香柏树已经倒下， 挺拔的树木已被毁坏。 巴珊的橡树啊，哀号吧， 因为茂密的树林已被砍倒。
